channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Highlights from the Sydney Film Festival 2026: Must-See Films and Free Events
item.description: The Sydney Film Festival 2026 is gearing up to showcase an impressive lineup of 248 films from 81 countries. Among the top highlights are 'The Death of Robin Hood', directed by Michael Sarnoski, featu...

item.title: Portable Fundus Cameras Launched to Help Early Detection of Diabetic Retinopathy in Tanzania
item.description: More than 15 million people living in Dar es Salaam, Dodoma, Mbeya regions and nearby areas are set to benefit from new Portable Fundus Camera technology. This equipment is specially designed for earl...

item.title: Rubio urges UN to condemn Iran over attacks on commercial ships in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio don yarn say the United Nations dey lose im relevance as Iran dey continue to cause wahala for the Strait of Hormuz. According to am, Iran don dey attack commercial...

item.title: Lucid sees lower Q1 deliveries and revenue miss, shares fall after hours
item.description: Lucid Group’s shares declined in after‑hours trading on May 5, 2026, after the electric‑vehicle maker reported weaker first‑quarter sales and a larger‑than‑expected loss. The company said revenue for ...

item.title: Ontario lowers colorectal cancer screening age from 50 to 45 starting July 1
item.description: Ontario is lowering the recommended age for colorectal cancer screening from 50 to 45, with the change taking effect on July 1. The decision, announced by Cancer Care Ontario and outlined in an Ontari...

item.title: Turkey unveils YILDIRIMHAN, its longest-range hypersonic missile
item.description: Turkey’s Defense Ministry revealed the YILDIRIMHAN, a liquid-fueled ballistic missile capable of hypersonic speeds, marking the longest-range missile developed domestically in Turkey. The missile was ...

item.title: Stephen Colbert Jokes About Kamikaze Dolphins During Pete Hegseth Pentagon Briefing
item.description: On May 6, 2026, Stephen Colbert used his 'Late Show' platform to highlight a peculiar moment from Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth's recent Pentagon press briefing. The briefing touched on reports that ...

item.title: BNP Welcomes BJP Win in West Bengal, Hopes for Progress on Teesta Water Agreement
item.description: On May 6, 2026, the Bangladesh Nationalist Party (BNP) formally congratulated the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) for its electoral success in West Bengal. Azizul Baree Helal, BNP's Information Secretary...

item.title: Timeline of 2025 Pakistan-India Military Escalation and Ceasefire
item.description: A year ago, Pakistan and India engaged in a short but intense military conflict known as Marka-i-Haq, which started after the Pahalgam attack on 22 April and ended with a ceasefire on 10 May 2025. Ten...

item.title: Former SNP Council Leader Jordan Linden Sentenced for Sexual Crimes Involving Minors
item.description: Jordan Linden, a former council leader representing the Scottish National Party (SNP), has been sentenced to prison following convictions for sexual offences involving young men and boys. The case, wh...

item.title: Wike Threatens Action Against Turaki-Led PDP Headquarters and Banks in Abuja
item.description: The Federal Capital Territory (FCT) Minister, Nyesom Wike, don issue serious warning to any house wey dem dey use as headquarters for the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) under Taminu Turaki faction for...

item.title: DepEd Reports Significant Improvement in Reading and Math Skills Among Filipino Learners
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) announced that 4.5 million learners across all grade levels, who were initially identified as struggling readers, have shown notable improvement in their literacy s...

item.title: Louise Arbour Appointed Governor General Amid Rising Separatist Sentiment
item.description: Former Supreme Court Justice Louise Arbour has been appointed as the next Governor General of Canada, at a time when separatist movements are gaining momentum in certain provinces. Arbour brings exten...

item.title: Senate Opens Public Consultation on Proposed Forest Conservation Bill
item.description: The Kenyan Senate has started inviting the general public to give their views on the Forest Conservation and Management (Amendment) Bill, 2025, which was read for the first time on 5th May 2026. The B...

item.title: How to Make Classic Honeycomb with Chocolate Coating
item.description: This article provides a detailed recipe for making traditional honeycomb, a sweet, crunchy treat often enjoyed as a dessert or snack. The ingredients include 200g of honey (or Golden Syrup as a substi...

item.title: Borno Lawmaker Appeals to Constituents for Support in Fifth-Term Bid
item.description: Hon Audu Mustapha Ganga, wey dey represent Magumeri Federal Constituency for House of Representatives, don beg him people make dem support am for him fifth term bid. The lawmaker don dey for the seat ...

item.title: Kenya and Tanzania Strengthen Ties for Economic Growth
item.description: During his state visit to Tanzania, Kenyan President William Ruto addressed the Tanzanian Parliament in Dodoma, emphasizing that Kenya and Tanzania are not just neighbours but deeply connected economi...

item.title: Step-by-Step Madeira Loaf Recipe with Lemon Zest
item.description: This article presents a detailed recipe for a classic Madeira loaf, perfect for baking enthusiasts in South Africa. The recipe calls for 200g of softened unsalted butter, 200g of castor sugar, three l...

item.title: Pakistan’s Consumer-Led Solar Energy Transition and Challenges
item.description: Pakistan is witnessing an extraordinary shift towards solar energy, driven largely by ordinary citizens rather than government programmes. Between 2021 and 2024, electricity tariffs increased by over ...
